data.param: {"input":"{\"image_input\":[],\"aspect_ratio\":\"16:9\",\"output_format\":\"png\",\"prompt\":\"Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.\\nRole: inline.\\nPurpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block..\\nDiagram type: stage_evolution.\\nConcept summary: 如果你还在把模型架构升级理解成一场参数和 benchmark 的军备竞赛，那 Mamba-3 这篇博客真正想纠正的，可能正是这种看法。它不是在说“我们又做了个更强版本”，而是在说：当后训练、RL rollout、agent workflow 都开始把推理压力推到天花板附近，架构….\\nStyle direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first.\\nBackground: warm cream paper-like background.\\nPrimary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.\\nLine work: soft dark gray line work.\\nScene elements: 3-4 stage panels, left-to-right arrows, evolution markers.\\nKey relationships to visualize: show progression across stages, make the shift in logic visually obvious.\\nLayout pattern: single_concept_centered.\\nDiagram focus: one section concept.\\nText position: integrated.\\nOn-canvas headline: \\\"这次真正值得看的，不是又多了一个新版本号，而是模型架构…\\\".\\nOn-canvas subheadline: \\\"如果你还在把模型架构升级理解成一场参数和 benchmark 的军备竞…\\\".\\nMust have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, keep labels short, focus on one concept only, maintain same house style as cover.\\nMust avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, no decorative filler, no unrelated icons.\\nAdditional direction: Visualize this section's main idea: 这次真正值得看的，不是又多了一个新版本号，而是模型架构….\\nThe result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.\\nKeep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.\",\"resolution\":\"1K\"}","model":"nano-banana-2"}
